agent.greeting: Hey. I'm your Forkless agent. I'm here to help you get things done — ask me anything, tell me what you need, or just explore what's possible.
cannedResponses: Good question. Let me think about the best approach for that. Can you tell me a bit more about what you're trying to accomplish?
I can definitely help with that. Let's start by understanding what you already have in place.
Interesting. The approach I'd recommend depends on a few things — what does your current setup look like?
That's something I can work with. Let's break it down into manageable steps and tackle them one at a time.
Got it. Before I make any recommendations, I want to make sure I understand the full picture. What's the priority here?
Makes sense. Let me pull together some options for you. Any constraints I should know about?
That's a solid starting point. The key is getting the foundations right before layering on complexity.
I hear you. Let me think about that and come back with a concrete recommendation.

welcome.title: Welcome to Forkless
welcome.description: Your sovereign development platform. Start a conversation to explore what's possible.

emptyState.title: Your artifacts will appear here
emptyState.description: As you work with the agent, your documents, reports, plans, and other artifacts will materialize in this space.

features.title: Exports
features.description: Portable files you can download and share
